title: Default view doesn't open which clicking email notifications
excerpt:

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

If I receive a notification via email and want to click to respond, it opens up the Main Board rather than using what I have set as our Default View. This is annoying as then the information I want is not readily accessible and then I have to go into the correct view, search the property, and find it that way.

posts.author: jesscw (Jessica CW)
posts.cookedHtml: My team having this issue as well! It’s very frustrating to our workflow.

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: Yep agreed. It honestly makes no sense that it should ever default back to the Main Table when another board is chosen as the main view.

posts.author: CareyLibrary (Carey Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. Not just from email, but any notifications. They all open to the main board even if the item was opened in a different board view. We have a specific view for customers and when they click on a notification it goes to the Main board view where they can see things that we had hidden from their specific view.

posts.author: Dian94 (Dian Maritz)
posts.cookedHtml: We have views to make work digestible in a system with a huge amount of columns. It would be great if a notification or email took you straight to the defaulted view instead of the main tab. Even better if each person could customize it for themselves to what view the notification or email takes them on a board.

posts.author: Margaret_MBG (Margaret Chan)
posts.cookedHtml: hello! we are experiencing the same situation. Does anyone know if there is a way around it as I agree that it breaks the workflow.
